info.name: KLC EV Charging API
info.description:
Complete API collection for KLC EV Charging Station Management System.

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection + KLC Cloud environment
2. Run '1. Login (Mobile)' or '1. Login (Admin)' first — tokens auto-saved
3. All subsequent requests use saved tokens automatically

**Test users:**
- Mobile: 0983987986 / 123456x@X
- Admin: admin / Admin@123

exec: pm.test('Admin API is healthy', function() { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
